demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult child present and involved in care

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I try to stand up, the room spins, my vision goes black, and I have absolutely no strength left in my body. (Spoken with help from the patient's adult child, who made the call.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the last week she has gone from tired to completely unable to get out of bed; today she nearly fainted every time she tried to stand and can't stay upright.

symptom_narrative.onset: gradual worsening over about a week, on top of feeling run down for a couple of years
symptom_narrative.duration: about a week of rapid decline, bedbound today
symptom_narrative.character: overwhelming weakness and exhaustion, with dizziness and blacking-out vision whenever she stands
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst she has ever felt — completely wiped out and unable to move around safely
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole body weakness; the dizziness and vision blackout come on with standing
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst on standing or sitting up; a bit better lying flat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying down flat seems to settle the dizziness a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up or trying to move around brings on the spinning and near-fainting
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feels the cold terribly and piles on extra blankets even in a warm room; adult child has noticed her get sweaty and muddled/confused at times; has lost weight without trying
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no single episode like this before, but she has been increasingly weak and worn out over the past couple of years
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound today, cannot stand or walk safely, fully dependent on her adult child

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a very difficult childbirth about 15 years ago with heavy bleeding afterwards that needed treatment
her periods stopped altogether about two years ago
says she has lost the hair under her arms and in the pubic area

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home; her adult child is present, made the call and is helping care for her

communication_style.typical_message_style: weak and tires quickly; much of the history relayed by the adult child

objective_data_offered.value: skin looks very pale, almost white, and thin/finely wrinkled; she looks frail and wasted
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over a video call; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: no darkening or bronzing of the skin visible on video
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: video lighting is unreliable for judging skin colour

objective_data_offered.value: adult child says she keeps piling on heavy blankets even though the room is warm
adult child says she goes sweaty and confused/muddled off and on
adult child says she nearly blacks out and the room spins every time she tries to sit up or stand
